ValidationRule.errorConditionFormula: AND( $Setup.Kingsbridge_General_Custom_Setting__c.Validation_Rule__c = False, $User.Alias <> 'IntUser', $User.Alias <> 'guest', RecordType.Name = "Partner Lead", Partner_Channel__c = 'Affinity', ISCHANGED( IsConverted ), IsConverted , OR( ISBLANK( No_Monthly_Sign_Ups__c ), ISBLANK( Existing_Customer_Engagement__c) , ISBLANK( How_Kingsbridge_fit_into_the_process__c ) , ISBLANK( Integrated_Q_B_Journey_Requested__c ) , ISBLANK( Kingsbridge_Proposal_Details__c ) ) )
ValidationRule.errorMessage:
LV3: Please fill the following fields before converting the lead.
No. Monthly Sign-Ups Existing Customer Engagement How will Kingsbridge fit into the process? Integrated Q&B Journey Requested? Kingsbridge Proposal Details
